details.goal: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, verify the login page loads with the Swag Labs branding, enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce' into the respective fields, click the Login button, and verify you are redirected to the inventory page that displays multiple products with the title 'Products' visible at the top. Also verify the shopping cart icon is visible in the top right corner

details.reason: tool=type_text params=map[selector:#user-name value:standard_user] reason=Fill the username field (#user-name) with the provided 'standard_user' before entering the password and clicking Login.
tool=type_text params=map[selector:#user-name value:standard_user] reason=Enter the username into the observed #user-name field as the next step toward logging in
⚠ LOOP DETECTED: step type_text map[selector:#user-name value:standard_user] repeated. Try a different approach or use finish.
tool=type_text params=map[selector:#password value:secret_sauce] reason=Enter the password into the #password field (use observed selector and avoid repeating typing into #user-name to prevent loop)
tool=type_text params=map[selector:#password value:secret_sauce] reason=Enter the password into the #password field (username was already entered); next step before clicking Login.
⚠ LOOP DETECTED: step type_text map[selector:#password value:secret_sauce] repeated. Try a different approach or use finish.

tool=evaluate params=map[expression:(function(){var el=document.querySelector('#password'); if(!el) return 'password-field-not-found'; el.focus(); el.value='secret_sauce'; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); return 'password-set';})()] reason=Set the #password field via JS instead of repeating type_text (avoid loop) so the form is ready for Login.

params.expression: (function(){var el=document.querySelector('#password'); if(!el) return 'password-field-not-found'; el.focus(); el.value='secret_sauce'; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); return 'password-set';})()

details.reason: tool=click params=map[selector:#login-button] reason=Submit the already-entered credentials by clicking the Login button (#login-button) to proceed to the inventory page (avoid retyping to prevent the detected loop).
tool=observe_ui params=map[] reason=Refresh the page DOM to locate the 'Products' title and the shopping cart icon (they weren't present in the last observation which only showed item links/buttons).

tool=observe_ui params=map[] reason=Re-scan the page to locate the 'Products' header and the shopping cart icon (they were not present among selectors in the last observation) before performing verification.

tool=finish params=map[status:fail] reason=Multiple observe_ui() results do not show a selector for the 'Products' title or the shopping cart icon; after repeated observations the required elements cannot be verified.
Multiple observe_ui() results do not show a selector for the 'Products' title or the shopping cart icon; after repeated observations the required elements cannot be verified.

details.goal: Click on the shopping cart icon to navigate to the cart page. Verify that exactly 2 items are in the cart with their correct names and prices matching what was added. Verify the total price is displayed. Remove one of the items from the cart by clicking its 'Remove' button. Verify only 1 item remains in the cart and the cart badge count updated. Click the 'Checkout' button to proceed to the checkout information page

details.goal: On the order confirmation page, verify the success message 'Thank you for your order!' is displayed. Verify the order completion icon (checkmark or similar) is visible. Capture a screenshot of the confirmation page. Verify the order total matches the expected amount from the overview page. Then click the 'Back Home' button to return to the inventory page. Finally, click the menu button (hamburger icon) in the top left, select 'Logout' from the menu, and verify you are redirected back to the SauceDemo login page
